## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Context

- Link the issue this PR addresses. If no issue exists, please see [CONTRIBUTING.md](/CONTRIBUTING.md) to see if one should be created prior to opening a PR.
- If this is substantive feature work, link the approved planning document.

## Validation

List the checks you ran. If you did not run a relevant check, say so.

## Checklist

- [ ] The PR is scoped and focused.
- [ ] I linked the relevant issue, if one exists.
- [ ] I linked the planning document, if one was required.
- [ ] I added or updated tests when behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated docs when behavior or workflow changed.
- [ ] I called out security-sensitive changes and tradeoffs when relevant.
